items: Sonny Gray blanked The Yankees for 7.1 innings, striking out 9 in Boston's 5-4 win.
Ryan O'Hearn homered 2 times, driving in 4 as Pittsburgh beat Cincinnati, 9-4.
Luis García Jr. homered 2 times, driving in 5 as Washington beat Baltimore, 6-4.
Luis García Jr. had 5 RBI, with 2 home runs as Washington beat Baltimore, 6-4.
Chicago Cubs edged Milwaukee, 4-3, in 10 innings.
St. Louis walked off Miami, 2-1 — one of 5 one-run finishes across the league.
